provenance: Derived from a Cowork-collected Canggu sport/fitness venue lead sheet (OtherBali_CANGGU_all_sport_clubs_40plus_20260720.csv): gym, fitness, yoga/pilates, padel, tennis, combat, climbing and related venues, sourced from existing Other Bali contact enrichment and OpenStreetMap searches around the Obsidian Gym anchor point. Staged here as leads only — no editorial content has been written, no address has been verified, and no dedup against the live catalogue has been performed.
piiPolicy: Phone numbers and emails from the source sheet are omitted from this artifact (AGENTS.md guardrails #12/#14). They remain only in the original Cowork working sheet, which is not committed to this repository.
googleReviewDataPolicy: google_rating/google_reviews from the source sheet must never be published or shown anywhere public in Other Bali (guardrail #2 — no Google review scraping/republishing). Kept per-row under internalOnly for operator triage only; internalOnly.doNotPublish is true on every row as an explicit machine-checkable marker.
dedupeAgainstCatalogue: NOT performed. The authoring session has no live access to the production venues table (network-isolated sandbox). An operator with DB access must check each candidate against the current catalogue before import — several source rows are tagged 'existing OtherBali enriched', which may mean they are already leads elsewhere in the system, not necessarily already-published venues; this was not verified here.
categoryMapping: lib/types.ts VenueCategory has no dedicated sport-club category. Every row maps onto the existing 'fitness' or 'yoga' category (surf schools map to the existing 'surf' category); the specific sport (padel, climbing, MMA, pilates, lagree...) is preserved in vibeTags/sportGroup so nothing is lost. No new category or entity was added. This is separate from docs/architecture/ACTIVITIES_CULTURE_TRACK_SCOPING.md, which scopes a genuinely new content type (attractions/culture/day-trips) still awaiting founder approval — this batch needed no such approval because fitness/yoga already exist.
notes: These are venue CANDIDATES, not published venues. No editorial content (why_its_here/best_for/what_to_order) has been drafted for any row — that requires an actual site visit or a verified official-source read per AGENTS.md guardrail #10, not just a lead sheet.
readyToPublish is false for every row in this batch — it means 'not yet', not 'rejected'.
'leadSource'/'cowworkStatus' describe Cowork's own sourcing method (existing contact-enrichment pass vs raw OpenStreetMap search around the Obsidian Gym anchor); they are not Other Bali verification.
gmapsUrl is a generated Google Maps SEARCH query built from name+area — not a verified pin. No street address was collected in the source sheet.

Rows with districtNeedsConfirmation=true sit at the boundary of the Canggu catchment (Kerobokan/Umalas/Dalung/west edge) per Cowork's own 'verify edge' status — district should be confirmed, not assumed as canggu.
